author: serenita_io
content:
The rest of us is saying it's a bad thing to default to (for the reasons mentioned earlier) that ultimately hurts the unsophisticated proposer.

I'm going to say again that I believe the best thing we can do is make those headers required, giving the builders information on how quickly they need to return a response. We just need to agree on a good default value, whether that is 300ms into the slot or 1 second. I don't think 0 is a good default.

I understand your desire to let the auction "play out" on the proposer side. However, since we all like to talk about rational behavior, that is not the rational thing to do for proposer since it only leads to lower bids if your goal is to propose by some time into the slot.
